title: eriophorum dubium
intro: Eriophorum dubium, also known as the cotton sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is native to wetlands and marshy areas in Northern Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. Eriophorum dubium is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and can also be used in herbal infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile plant for natural health remedies.
